conclusion: ยังสรุปไม่ได้
conclusion_reason: Moneyness/target-gap scenarios can be evaluated on current real data, but delta-based selection is blocked because normalized option quotes do not contain Greeks.

delta_selection_assessment.reason: Current normalized option_quote artifacts contain strike, bid, ask, sizes, timestamps, and symbols, but no delta, gamma, implied volatility, or model inputs needed for a defensible delta selection rule.
required_before_delta_experiment: provider Greeks at decision timestamp, or
approved point-in-time implied-volatility model with documented inputs and validation

dsr_assessment.reason: DSR is recorded as a blocker because this is a multi-scenario diagnostic grid, all scenarios are under-sampled, and no production strike rule is selected.

methodology.chronological_policy: 2023-03-01..2023-12-29 in-sample, 2024-01-02..2024-12-31 OOS; no OOS tuning from this report.
methodology.data_policy: No new paid data was downloaded for this experiment.
methodology.delta_policy: Delta selection is not run because the current normalized Databento option_quote records contain no delta, implied volatility, or Greeks fields. No proxy delta is substituted.
methodology.scope: Sub-System A ORB directional debit vertical on current real-data artifacts only.
methodology.selection_policy: Best/worst scenarios are diagnostic only. No production strike rule is selected from this under-sampled grid.
methodology.strike_mapping: nearest_discrete_strike_rounding; no interpolation; long strike maps from target breakout-to-long gap to the nearest tradable SPY 0DTE strike in the breakout direction.
